project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor for MetaTrader 5, with Python backtesting framework
build_system: MetaTrader 5 Strategy Tester (cannot build in sandbox - validation by code review)
test_framework: MT5 Strategy Tester backtesting (not available in sandbox)
test_command: N/A - tested via MT5 Strategy Tester
verification_instructions: 1. Review the MQL5 EA logic against the Python backtest logic line-by-line. 2. Confirm RSI uses iRSI() handles for Wilder smoothing. 3. Confirm signal generation matches Python exactly (RSI8 independently, RSI14 independently, 4-bar reversal independently). 4. Confirm position sizing formula matches Python. 5. Confirm session filter, cooldown, and position management match.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just edit the .mq5 file
environment_constraints: Cannot compile MQL5 in sandbox. Cannot run MT5 Strategy Tester. Validation is by careful code review ensuring exact logic match with the Python backtest.
contribution_requirements: Commit with message: fix: rewrite EA to match Python backtest logic (847 trades, 1911% return)
key_patterns: The Python backtest (run_aggressive_backtest.py) is the authoritative reference. Every logic decision in the EA must match the Python exactly.
directory_structure: hft_scalper/ - main project dir; hft_scalper/output/ - EA output; hft_scalper/results/ - backtest results
